'''chalungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arabinoglycerolipid|arabinoglycerolipid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-l-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arabinoglycerolipid|arabinoglycerolipid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chalungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || chælingith || chælingij || chælingish || chælingi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || chalulunguth || chalulunguj || chalulungush || chalulungu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || chalunguth || chalunguj || chalungush || chalungu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || chalufngufth || chalufngufj || chalufngufsh || chalufnguf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || chalunguthu || chalunguju || chalungushu || chalunguku
|-
| [[Patient]] || chalunguth || chalunguj || chalungush || chalungu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || chalunguthul || chalungujul || chalungushul || chalungukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || chalunguuthuthu || chalunguujuju || chalunguushushu || chalunguuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || chalunguthun || chalungujun || chalungushun || chalungukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || chalunguthuoro || chalungujuoro || chalungushuoro || chalungukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
